name: Recent Install - Direct to Form With Documentation
description: Caller ready to submit; needs the full documentation checklist.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: My mechanic says the battery you installed is failing and I have his report. What do I include in the claim?
expectedOutcome: Agent directs to greenbeanbattery.com form, lists what to include (DTCs, vehicle symptoms, photos/scan reports, when the issue started), tells them to note in comments it occurred shortly after a recent installation, and sets expectations.
